title: 期望的重量
intro: 在一次家庭聚餐中，你鼓起勇气想和母亲谈谈自己的感受。
introLines: 母亲放下筷子，目光中带着期待。
你感到心跳加速，不知如何开口。
空气中弥漫着未说出口的话语。
opponent: 我为你付出了这么多，你为什么不能更努力一点？
opponentPrompt: 一位五十岁左右的母亲，用户的母亲，说话方式直接、带有期望，施压方式通过表达失望和比较，防御方式是否认自己过度施压，性别为女性。
coachPrompt: 实时帮忙专家应重点教用户使用‘我’语句表达感受，设定个人边界，避免指责性语言，促进理解和对话。
analysisPrompt: 复盘分析师在这个场景中要重点观察的表达模式包括：用户是否使用防御性语言或回避话题，对方是否重复压力性话语或表现出情绪化反应，不能做心理诊断。
winCondition: 场景胜利条件是对方通过言行可观察地承认用户的感受，并同意调整期望或承诺更平等的对话，不能把辱骂或压制当胜利。
refereePrompt: 裁判在本场景应重点检查的让步、边界或行动承诺，例如对方是否做出具体承诺减少比较或同意倾听，确保对话边界得到尊重。
artPrompt: Retain the same cozy family living room environment from the thumbnail, with a wooden dining table, chairs, and soft lighting, viewed from a slightly low angle. Keep the right side open for character placement. Remove all people. Ensure the atmosphere feels intimate yet tense.
thumbnailArtPrompt: A cozy family living room with a wooden dining table, chairs, and soft lighting. A middle-aged woman (the mother) stands by the table, holding a report card, looking stern and disappointed. The composition is suitable for a horizontal thumbnail, focusing on the conflict moment. No text. Style: Japanese retro hand-drawn manga manuscript sketch from the 1990s, monochrome black-and-white, high contrast, warm aged paper scan, thick outlines, rough ink lines, pencil marks, loose strokes, charcoal shading, cross-hatching, raw sketch texture, simple background.
opponentArtPrompt: A middle-aged woman in her fifties, mother figure, standing pose, expression stern and disappointed, short hair, wearing a casual home outfit, holding a report card, facing left. Black-and-white hand-drawn manga sketch style with paper cutout edges. Identity, clothing, and props must match the thumbnail. Gender: female. Three-quarter or full body view.. Japanese retro hand-drawn manga manuscript sketch from the 1990s, like an original comic artist draft scanned from an old sketchbook, monochrome black-and-white low-saturation image, high contrast, warm nostalgic aged off-white paper scan, thick handmade black outlines, rough uneven ink lines, visible pencil construction marks and corrections, loose graphite strokes, charcoal shading, dense cross-hatching for shadows, raw sketch texture, simple background only. No color, no vivid yellow background, no solid yellow fill background, no 3D effect, no glossy high-definition anime rendering, no modern digital painting style, no smooth clean AI linework, no complex background, no overly polished commercial anime character design. Visible off-white paper-cut silhouette with irregular paper edge, low-detail expressive face, not photorealist
